results.possibleIdentity: Robert T. Vogel was an engineer and audio-visual designer active in the late 1960s and early 1970s. He resided in Freeport, New York, and graduated from the Newark College of Engineering (now the New Jersey Institute of Technology) in 1967. Professionally, he was associated with a firm called Theater Technology for Business and Industry Limited, where he served as an Audio Visual Designer specializing in lighting, projection, and audio-visual design. He was a participant in the technical services program of Experiments in Art and Technology (E.A.T.), a non-profit organization that matched artists with engineers and scientists to promote collaborative works.
